chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3235 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.17118/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 4 and 7 3. For order on CMA No.13980/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No.13981/2025 (Stay) 5. For order on CMA No.13982/2025 (Inspection) 6. For hearing of main case 16.9.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-6. The main grievance of the petitioner is that according to him an illegal construction has been made on Plot No.C-202, Block-A, KDA Scheme-36, Gulistan-e-Jauhar, Karachi. He has however, not made any application to the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM). Accordingly, the petitioner at first instance shall file his complaint through the SCRM of the SBCA. In the event that such complaint is lodged, the SBCA shall deal with the same in accordance with its own SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General SBCA, for information. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
